name: Tandem
description: Go from idea to production without the chaos: Tandem is a repo-native PM co-pilot for Claude Code that keeps every project on track from North Star → OKRs → PRD → Epic → Feature → Story → Testplan → ship. You get a closed-set status enum, mandatory Story↔Testplan pairing, Definition-of-Ready/Done gates, automatic ADRs on every decision, auto-filed bugs on test failure, and a self-generating interactive Command Center — all in plain Markdown, no external tools required. Stack-agnostic across web, mobile, CLI, library, backend, data-pipeline, Power Platform, and automation projects.
